prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock N73 6.75L V12 (453 hp, 531 lb-ft) with a bespoke twin-turbo setup using two Garrett GTX5533R turbos (1.35 A/R, 106mm compressor wheels) paired with a custom-forged internals kit from Mahle Motorsport (9.5:1 compression, billet crankshaft, Carrillo H-beam rods, and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons). The turbo system includes a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by GReddy (equal-length, 1.75-inch primaries) and a dual-ceramic-coated 3.5-inch downpipe with a secondary wastegate dump routed into the main exhaust stream for reduced backpressure.

Fuel & Ignition: Upgrade to a Motec M150 ECU with a fully mapped flex-fuel calibration (E85 compatible) and a dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump system (1,200 LPH total capacity). The fuel system includes ID1700x injectors (side-feed, 1,700cc/min) and a custom fuel rail with -8AN feed and return lines. Ignition is handled by a standalone AEM CDI system with NGK R8482-10 iridium racing plugs (0.024" gap) and custom coil-on-plug adapters for the N73’s direct ignition system.

Drivetrain & Cooling: Install a ZF 8HP90 8-speed automatic transmission with a custom torque converter (3,800 RPM stall, billet stator) and a Peloquin differential (3.73:1 final drive, 40% lockup). The cooling system is upgraded with a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (Series 1, 23" x 19") and a custom dual-core aluminum radiator from CSF Racing (part #8024) with dual SPAL 16" puller fans (2,500 CFM each). The intercooler system uses a custom air-to-water setup with a Garrett dual-core heat exchanger (12" x 24" x 3.5") and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump.
estetica: Body: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit by Novitec Rolls-Royce (Phantom VII-specific, includes front splitter, side skirts, rear diffuser, and a 3-piece adjustable rear wing with a 1,200mm span and Gurney flap). The kit is finished in a custom matte "Phantom Black" with hand-polished carbon weave accents. The front bumper is modified with a custom 3D-printed grille insert (laser-sintered titanium, honeycomb mesh) and a pair of LED daytime running lights from Hella (500 Series, 6,000K, 1,200 lumens each).

Wheels & Suspension: Fit a set of Forgeline GA3R wheels (22x10.5" front, 22x12.5" rear) with a custom concave design and a brushed titanium finish. The wheels are wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/30R22 front, 335/25R22 rear) with a custom tire lettering in "Bespoke Silver." The suspension is replaced with a full air ride system by Air Lift Performance (3P management, custom valving for the Phantom VII’s subframe) paired with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (2-way adjustable, 400lb/in front springs, 500lb/in rear springs) for track use. The system includes a custom hydraulic bump stop kit from Hyperco (2-stage progressive rate) and a set of polyurethane subframe bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1000K).

Interior & Lighting: Retrim the entire cabin in a combination of Bridge of Weir leather ("Midnight Sapphire" with contrast stitching in "Ice Blue") and Alcantara suede (headliner, door cards, and center console). The front seats are replaced with Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point harnesses) and the rear seats are removed for a custom aluminum storage cage (powder-coated "Phantom Silver") with a built-in fire suppression system (FireBottle 2.0, 2kg Halotron). The interior lighting is upgraded to a full RGB LED system by Diode Dynamics (custom-programmed via Arduino, synchronized with the infotainment system) and the headliner is fitted with a custom fiber-optic starfield (10,000 points, controlled via a dedicated iPad app).
